items.text: Original Sale Deed (registered) in owner's name
items.note: Must be registered at Sub-Registrar. Keep 3 certified copies.

items.text: Encumbrance Certificate (EC) — minimum 30 years
items.note: From Sub-Registrar office. Bank insists on 30-yr EC showing no mortgage or lien.

items.text: Pattadar Passbook / Pahani (Meebhoomi)
items.note: meebhoomi.ap.gov.in — confirms revenue records in your name.

items.text: Latest Property Tax receipt (GVMC Khanapayment)
items.note: Must be paid up to date. Required for both building permission and bank loan.

items.text: Survey Settlement Register (SSR) extract
items.note: From MRO office. Confirms survey number S.No. 46 ownership.

items.text: Link documents / chain of title (prior sale deeds)
items.note: Bank requires clear title chain for minimum 30 years.

items.text: Ratnagiri HB Colony layout approval copy
items.note: Your plot is MIG-167 in HB Colony. Get the colony layout approval from GVMC records.

items.text: Land classification confirmed as residential (non-agricultural)
items.note: Confirm in Pahani. Must be residential, not agricultural.

items.text: Building Permission Order — PER/1086/0349/2026 ✓ OBTAINED
items.note: Obtained 30-04-2026. Valid. Check BPO for commencement deadline and conditions.

items.text: Digitally signed approved plan — all 5 sheets from APDPMS portal
items.note: Download from portal.apdpms.ap.gov.in with your file number. Print A1 size. Keep digital PDF. PRIMARY on-site document.

items.text: LTP (Licensed Technical Person) signed copies of all drawings
items.note: Abdul Mannan / Mannan Design Group must sign all drawing sets. Required by APDPMS and all banks.

items.text: Structural Engineer stability certificate
items.note: Signed by licensed Structural Engineer. Required by APDPMS and bank.

items.text: Soil Test Report — Andhra University Civil Dept ✓ OBTAINED
items.note: Obtained 14-05-2026. SBC = 14.4 t/m². FOD = 2.4m. Keep original safely.

items.text: Building commencement notice filed with GVMC
items.note: Submit to GVMC Town Planning before breaking ground. Required by BP conditions.

items.text: Self-Certification Proforma (AP SCS 2025) — owner + LTP signed
items.note: AP SCS 2025 scheme. Both owner and LTP sign and upload to OBPS portal for instant permission.

items.text: LTP Plinth Level Inspection report (after plinth beam)
items.note: SCS 2025: LTP uploads PLI report within 7 days of plinth beam completion with geotagged photos.

items.text: Demolition NOC — existing structure (26.65 sqm)
items.note: Get GVMC demolition permission before demolishing old structure on site.

items.text: APEPDCL — temporary construction electricity connection
items.note: Apply to APEPDCL Vizag for temp construction power. Needed before work starts.

items.text: GVMC — water connection application
items.note: Apply for water and sewerage connection before construction starts.

items.text: Fire NOC — provisional (GVMC Fire Dept via APDPMS)
items.note: Required for G+2 residential. Apply via gvmc.gov.in Fire NOC portal.

items.text: Rain Water Harvesting (RWH) — implementation plan ready
items.note: AP mandate for buildings >300 sqm. Already shown in approved plan. Arrange contractor.

items.text: APEPDCL permanent connection — transformer sanction letter
items.note: Apply for permanent electricity sanction based on total load. Needed before handover.

items.text: Dedicated construction bank account opened
items.note: Separate savings/current account only for construction payments. Never mix with personal funds.

items.text: Builder contract signed — scope, milestones, penalties
items.note: Must include: full scope of work, stage-wise payment schedule, delay penalty clauses, completion date, material spec list.

items.text: Builder references verified — visit 2–3 completed projects
items.note: Talk to those owners directly. Do not rely on photos or builder's claims alone.

items.text: Contractor All Risk (CAR) insurance policy
items.note: Recommended for ₹1.4 Cr project. Covers material theft, fire, structural damage during construction.

items.text: Workmen's Compensation Policy (builder to provide)
items.note: Builder must have this. Protects you from liability if any labourer is injured on site.

items.text: KYC — Aadhaar + PAN card (all co-applicants)
items.note: Self-attested copies. Originals for bank verification. All co-owners must be co-applicants.

items.text: Income proof — salary slips (3 months) or ITR (3 years)
items.note: Salaried: slips + Form 16 + 6-month bank statement. Self-employed: ITR 3yr + P&L + balance sheet.

items.text: Bank statements — all accounts, last 6 months
items.note: Must show regular income credits. Joint account statements if applicable.

items.text: CIBIL score check — minimum 750 recommended
items.note: Check free at cibil.com. Score below 700 affects loan amount and interest rate significantly.

items.text: Original Sale Deed + EC submitted to bank
items.note: Bank holds originals as security. Get written acknowledgment receipt from bank.

items.text: APDPMS digitally signed approved plan submitted to bank
items.note: Bank requires the official approved plan. Complete item B2 first.

items.text: Structural Engineer certificate submitted to bank
items.note: Bank's technical valuer verifies structural safety. Same cert as item B3.

items.text: Detailed construction cost estimate submitted to bank
items.note: Bank sanctions 75–80% of construction cost. Get estimate prepared by your engineer.

items.text: Loan sanction letter received from bank
items.note: Keep original. Disbursements are stage-wise after bank technical officer inspects each stage.

items.text: Bank technical valuation done (pre-disbursement)
items.note: Bank sends officer before each disbursement. Keep their contact number handy for quick visits.

groups.title: F. On-Site Setup Before Work Starts

items.text: Approved plan — all 5 sheets laminated and kept on site
items.note: In a waterproof folder on site at all times. GVMC inspector may visit any time.

items.text: BPO displayed at site entrance (visible hoarding)
items.note: GVMC requirement — Building Permission Order must be visibly displayed at entry.

items.text: Site hoarding / boundary fence erected
items.note: Secure perimeter before any demolition or excavation begins.

items.text: Temporary water + electricity connections live
items.note: Construction cannot start without both. Arrange before handing over to builder.

items.text: Watchman + temporary accommodation ready
items.note: Live-in watchman with family before first material delivery. Water + electricity + toilet arranged.

items.text: Soil test report + approved plan handed to builder supervisor
items.note: Builder supervisor must have copies on Day 1. No excuse for wrong founding depth.

items.text: Construction commencement date recorded officially
items.note: Note date in writing. BPO has a commencement deadline. Inform LTP to log it in APDPMS.

items.text: Completion certificate from LTP / structural engineer
items.note: LTP certifies construction matches approved plan. Without this, OC won't be processed.

items.text: Occupancy Certificate (OC) application — APDPMS portal
items.note: Apply at portal.apdpms.ap.gov.in after completion. GVMC inspects within 15 days.

items.text: Fire NOC — final (post-construction)
items.note: GVMC Fire Dept final NOC after building complete. Required for OC.

items.text: APEPDCL permanent metered connection installed
items.note: Apply with OC draft. Transformer sanction obtained at item C6.

items.text: GVMC permanent water + sewerage connection
items.note: Apply with OC copy.

items.text: Property tax reassessment + new door number (GVMC)
items.note: After OC, apply to GVMC for revised property tax and new door number for the new building.

items.text: RWH + solar compliance certificate from LTP
items.note: AP state mandate. LTP certifies implementation on site.

items.text: Bank mortgage release after full loan repayment
items.note: Collect original sale deed from bank. Get mortgage cancellation deed registered at Sub-Registrar.

bs_stages.label: Excavation & Earthwork
checklist: Mark all column positions as per approved centerline drawing
Excavate to minimum 2.4m depth (as per soil report FOD)
Soil inspection at founding level — verify SBC matches 14.4 t/m²
Anti-termite chemical treatment pre-construction
Earthpit excavation for earthing (14 nos as per drawing)
Dewatering arrangement if groundwater encountered
Supervisor confirms all pit dimensions before PCC pour

tasks.text: Mark all column positions as per approved centerline drawing
Excavate to minimum 2.4m depth (as per soil report FOD)
Soil inspection at founding level — verify SBC matches 14.4 t/m²
Anti-termite chemical treatment pre-construction
Earthpit excavation for earthing (14 nos as per drawing)
Dewatering arrangement if groundwater encountered
Supervisor confirms all pit dimensions before PCC pour

bs_stages.label: Foundation & Footings
checklist: PCC 1:4:8 bed 150mm thick — 6.3 cum laid and cured
F1 footing (9×7.5ft) — 10Ø-22 bars both ways
F3 footings ×9 (4.5×4.5ft) — 10Ø-18 bars both ways
F4 footing (3.5×3.5ft) steel placed
F5 footing (2.5×2.5ft) steel placed
CF-1 combined footing 15×8ft — beam reinforcement as per drawing
Cover blocks 50mm placed before every pour
M20 concrete pour — 3 cube samples per pour collected
Curing 28 days minimum — watchman tally log 3× daily
Builder supervisor sign-off before backfilling

tasks.text: PCC 1:4:8 bed 150mm thick — 6.3 cum laid and cured
F1 footing (9×7.5ft) — 10Ø-22 bars both ways
F3 footings ×9 (4.5×4.5ft) — 10Ø-18 bars both ways
F4 footing (3.5×3.5ft) steel placed
F5 footing (2.5×2.5ft) steel placed
CF-1 combined footing 15×8ft — beam reinforcement as per drawing
Cover blocks 50mm placed before every pour
M20 concrete pour — 3 cube samples per pour collected
Curing 28 days minimum — watchman tally log 3× daily
Builder supervisor sign-off before backfilling

bs_stages.label: Columns & Plinth Beam
checklist: Column spacing verified against approved drawing before pour
Plinth beam 9×18in — 4×16Ø main + 8Ø stirrups@200mm
Cover blocks 38mm on all columns before shuttering
Shuttering plumb and aligned — spirit level both directions
M25 concrete pour — slump test + cube samples
No extra water added to concrete after batching
Column curing minimum 14 days
Photograph all columns before and after shuttering

tasks.text: Column spacing verified against approved drawing before pour
Plinth beam 9×18in — 4×16Ø main + 8Ø stirrups@200mm
Cover blocks 38mm on all columns before shuttering
Shuttering plumb and aligned — spirit level both directions
M25 concrete pour — slump test + cube samples
No extra water added to concrete after batching
Column curing minimum 14 days
Photograph all columns before and after shuttering

bs_stages.label: Stilt Slab (Slab 1)
checklist: Beam shuttering — check camber and prop spacing
Main beam 24×30in — 8×20Ø main + 10Ø stirrups@100mm (support)
Secondary beam reinforcement in place as per drawing
Slab bottom steel — 12Ø@100mm c/c main direction
Distribution steel — 8Ø@150mm placed throughout
Cover blocks 25mm on slab steel throughout
Electrical conduits placed and tied before pour
M25 concrete pour — mechanical vibration throughout
No construction load for 28 days after pour
Curing 28 days — watchman daily tally check

tasks.text: Beam shuttering — check camber and prop spacing

Distribution steel — 8Ø@150mm placed throughout

bs_stages.label: Ground Floor Slab (Slab 2)
checklist: GF columns C1/C2: 8×20Ø, C3: 4×20+4×16Ø
GF beam and slab shuttering erected
Beam reinforcement verified against drawing
Slab steel — 12Ø@100mm + 8Ø distribution
All plumbing sleeves and conduits in place
M25 pour + cube test samples
28-day curing

tasks.text: GF columns C1/C2: 8×20Ø, C3: 4×20+4×16Ø
GF beam and slab shuttering erected
Beam reinforcement verified against drawing
Slab steel — 12Ø@100mm + 8Ø distribution
All plumbing sleeves and conduits in place
M25 pour + cube test samples
28-day curing

bs_stages.label: First Floor Slab (Slab 3)
checklist: Lift shaft wall reinforcement (min 8.5ft footing depth)
Staircase RCC treads and landing slab
1F beams and slab reinforcement as per drawing
M25 pour + cube test
28-day curing

tasks.text: Lift shaft wall reinforcement (min 8.5ft footing depth)
Staircase RCC treads and landing slab
1F beams and slab reinforcement as per drawing
M25 pour + cube test
28-day curing

bs_stages.label: Second Floor + Terrace (Slabs 4 & 5)
checklist: 2F beams and slab reinforcement
Terrace slab — lift room + OHT room (216 sft)
Parapet wall provision minimum 600mm height
Terrace waterproofing slope maintained toward drains
M25 pour + cube test
Compile all cube test results for all 5 slabs
Deshuttering timeline as per IS 456

bs_stages.label: Brick Masonry
checklist: Outer 9in walls — 48,500 bricks, CM 1:6 PPC cement
Inner 4in walls — 44,770 bricks, CM 1:6
Lintel beams over all door and window openings
Bricks soaked minimum 30 min before use
Plumb and level check every 600mm height
Maximum 1m wall height per day per lift
Window and door frame positions verified against floor plan

tasks.text: Outer 9in walls — 48,500 bricks, CM 1:6 PPC cement
Inner 4in walls — 44,770 bricks, CM 1:6
Lintel beams over all door and window openings

Plumb and level check every 600mm height
Maximum 1m wall height per day per lift
Window and door frame positions verified against floor plan

bs_stages.label: Plastering
checklist: Hacking of all RCC surfaces before plaster
Internal plaster 12mm CM 1:6 all rooms
External plaster 15mm CM 1:5
Ceiling plaster 6mm CM 1:4
Chicken mesh at all brick-RCC junctions to prevent cracks
Groove lines and band courses on external facade
Curing 7 days after each plaster coat

tasks.text: Hacking of all RCC surfaces before plaster
Internal plaster 12mm CM 1:6 all rooms
External plaster 15mm CM 1:5
Ceiling plaster 6mm CM 1:4
Chicken mesh at all brick-RCC junctions to prevent cracks
Groove lines and band courses on external facade
Curing 7 days after each plaster coat

bs_stages.label: Electrical & Plumbing
checklist: Concealed conduits — Finolex / RR / Havells throughout
CPVC/UPVC plumbing — Astral / Truflo throughout
Borewell drilling 300–400ft completed
Water sump and OHT construction
MCB distribution boards — Legrand / Schneider all floors
Earthing — bear wire + 14 earth pits as per drawing
Inverter wiring provision all floors
Plumbing pressure test before closing walls
Electrical continuity test before plastering

bs_stages.label: Flooring & Tiling
checklist: 2×4ft Gujarat tiles all rooms — full evenness required
2×2ft bathroom floor tiles — uniform spacing
2×4ft bathroom wall tiles to ceiling height
Granite flooring — kitchen, staircase, lift, corridors (Blackberry/Steel Gray)
Kitchen granite platform + CC plank cupboards
Tile bond test 24h after laying — tap test for hollowness
No hollow sound anywhere — reject and re-lay

bs_stages.label: Doors, Windows & Railings
checklist: Main door — African Teak wood, frame 6×3in
All other door frames — granite frames
Bedroom / bathroom doors — Laminated / WPVC / PVC
UPVC windows 90-series — Wento / Simta Astrix
uPVC window grills + powder-coated SS security mesh
North/South balcony — SS 304 frame + glass railing panels
East balcony/utility — sliding glass door + granite frame
Staircase railing — Jindal SS 304

bs_stages.label: Painting & Exterior
checklist: Interior — putty finish + 2 coats emulsion (Berger / Asian / Birla Opus)
Exterior — texture weather-shield finish
Compound wall completed
Entrance gate installed
Driveway and approach finishing
Rain water harvesting structures as per approved plan
Septic tank + percolation pit completed

bs_stages.label: Systems & Handover
checklist: Lift installation — 5-person Touchwood / Jag
CCTV — 8 cameras + NVR 30-day recording
Generator installation — Escort / equivalent
Bathroom fittings — Hindware / Cera throughout
Kitchen sink — steel with U-shape tap
All taps and plumbing fixtures installed and tested
Permanent electricity connection live
Occupancy Certificate application filed with GVMC
Final snag list prepared and all items resolved
